import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let a = string.split_whitespace(line1)
  let b = string.split_whitespace(line2)
  let n = a.len()
  mut k = 0
  while k < n
    let sa = match a.get(k)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    let sb = match b.get(k)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    let ia = match string.parse_int(sa)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    let ib = match string.parse_int(sb)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    let s = ia + ib
    println("#{ia}+#{ib}=#{s}")
    k = k + 1
  end
  Ok(())
end
